hypothesis: INTC, LITE, and BE can be traded through a bounded real-money AI infrastructure pilot sleeve so the system can collect forward replacement-value evidence without promoting them into the core universe or polluting historical point-in-time backtests.
why_not_more_static_pool_tests: Prior static AI infrastructure tests already showed research value but also concentrated contribution and regime risk. The next scientific step is bounded forward trading attribution, not another broader static-pool pass.

parameters.single_causal_variable: production pilot sleeve activation for three preselected AI infrastructure candidates
parameters.counterfactual_policy: pre-trade decision snapshots are frozen before a pilot entry and compare the pilot candidate with ranked core alternatives, cash, and same-theme candidates when available
parameters.news_policy: daily production news sources and trade-news watchlist include trade-enabled pilot tickers

daily_production_validation.llm_note: The first run hit an OpenAI quota 429, then the prompt-only rerun completed cleanly. This did not block pilot signal generation or the standard backtests.

production_impact.parity_note: Historical canonical windows remain core-only because the pilot first_trade_allowed_as_of is 2026-05-01, after all three windows. This is intentional point-in-time behavior rather than a missing production hook.

decision_reason: Accepted as a bounded real-money pilot sleeve activation, not as a core universe promotion. The standard backtests remain stable under point-in-time rules, production now generates pilot signals when the shared signal chain finds them, and pilot trades will be separately sized, logged, and attributed against frozen counterfactuals.
known_risks: No pilot entry signal fired on 2026-05-01, so the live order path is wired but not yet exercised by a real pilot trade.
Pilot attribution needs forward samples before promotion decisions can be made.
Dedicated post-2026-05-01 pilot replay is still future work once enough forward data exists.
OpenAI quota errors can still affect LLM advice generation when an exhausted API key is configured.
next_steps: Let the daily run collect pilot decision snapshots and replacement-value outcomes.
Promote only after positive risk-adjusted replacement value, controlled drawdown, and non-concentrated forward contribution.
Do not add the wider AI infrastructure basket to core without separate point-in-time evidence.
